title: The Butterfly's Big Change
content:
Once upon a time, a tiny egg rested on the underside of a soft green leaf. It was so small you might never notice it. But inside that tiny egg, something magical was already beginning.

After a few days, the egg cracked open. Out crawled a very small, very hungry caterpillar! It had a long soft body and many tiny legs. The caterpillar had one job to do: eat! It munched and munched on leaves from morning until night.

The caterpillar ate and ate and grew bigger every single day. Then one day it climbed to a safe branch and began to spin silky threads around its body. It wrapped itself in a cozy case called a chrysalis. Inside, something extraordinary was happening.

The caterpillar's whole body was changing into something completely new. This incredible change is called metamorphosis. The chrysalis hung quietly in the breeze for many days while the magic happened inside.

One bright morning the chrysalis split gently open. Out crawled a beautiful butterfly! It spread its delicate wings and let the sunshine dry them. Then it launched into the blue sky and flew away. The tiny egg had become a beautiful butterfly!

author: Educational
